title: Cobblemon Interface [Botany Pots]
description: Botany Pots GUI in Cobblemon Interface style.
body:
This resource pack changes the default interface of the [Botany Pots](https://modrinth.com/mod/botany-pots) mod, giving it style and atmosphere [Cobblemon Interface](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-interface).

🎨 All original ideas and visual style of Cobblemon Interface belong to [VinnyStalck](https://modrinth.com/user/VinnyStalck).

🍇 Mod Botany Pots created by [Darkhax](https://modrinth.com/user/Darkhax).

## Recomendation
I highly recommend using this resource pack with the CobblePots mod, which will allow you to grow Cobblemon mod crops in pots.

### Important

Support for this resource pack will cease if [Cobblemon Interface Modded](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-interface-modded) starts supporting the Botany Pots mod.
